uta.name: ProTime – UTA
uta.jql: "Portfolio Team" = 3121 AND labels in ("RCA-Type-Defect", "RCA-TYPE-DEFECT") AND Classification != Security AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY priority DESC, created DESC

utm.name: ProTime – UTM
utm.jql: (issuetype in (Bug, Defect) OR labels = "RCA-Type-Defect") AND NOT labels in (Checkmarx, SCA, bitsight, automation, SAST, DAST) AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY priority DESC, created DESC

wfmClassic.name: ProTime – WFM Classic
wfmClassic.jql: (issuetype in (Bug, Defect) OR labels = "RCA-Type-Defect") AND NOT labels in (Checkmarx, SCA, bitsight, automation, SAST, DAST) AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY priority DESC, created DESC

securityJql: (issuetype in (Bug, Defect) OR labels = "RCA-Type-Defect") AND labels in (Checkmarx, SCA, bitsight, Security, CVE) ORDER BY priority DESC
